overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character traversing a snowy mountainous region. The character walks through snow-covered forests, passes a deceased bear, navigates a narrow rocky canyon, and crosses a shallow river with abandoned trucks. High-quality game engine rendering with cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered forest trail with pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snow-covered path through a pine forest

entered.detail: snow-covered trail winding through the forest
tall evergreen trees covered in snow lining both sides of the path
large snow-dusted rock formation on the right side of the path
utility lines visible against the sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide snow-covered forest trail surrounded by dense pine trees. The sun shines through partly cloudy skies, casting soft shadows on the snow. The path leads toward distant mountains with rocky outcrops visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching rocky terrain with wildlife

events.description: large dead bear becomes visible lying on the path ahead
passing the bear and approaching the entrance to a narrow rocky canyon

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a deceased bear on the left side of the path while heading toward rocky terrain

notable_agents.action: large bear lying dead on the snow with visible wounds

narrow gap between rock walls marking the canyon entry

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a deceased bear lying in the snow, then passes it on the left while continuing toward a narrow rocky canyon entrance. The forest becomes denser and darker as the canyon walls loom ahead.

events.description: entering narrow rocky canyon with high walls blocking the sky
exiting the canyon into open area with bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow canyon passage between high rock walls

entered.detail: tall steep rock walls covered in snow and ice rising on both sides
icy patches and frozen seeps on the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed canyon with steep rock walls on both sides blocking the sky. The path is covered in snow and ice, with the canyon walls creating a sheltered, shadowed environment before opening up at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with abandoned vehicles

events.description: stepping into shallow river water to cross the stream

agents.ego_description: exiting the canyon and crossing a shallow river past abandoned trucks

entered.detail: derelict green military-style truck with canvas cover parked by the river
large red semi-trailer truck abandoned in the river
clear shallow water flowing over rocky riverbed
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the canyon into a wide-open area with a shallow river. Abandoned trucks including a green military vehicle and red trailer are parked in and around the water. The character wades through the river while snow-covered mountains rise in the distance under bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a bright, snow-covered forest through a claustrophobic rocky gorge and into a wide river valley. It begins with the character walking along a wide trail flanked by dense pine trees under a partly cloudy sky, with rocky outcrops appearing in the distance. As the character passes a deceased bear lying in the snow, the forest grows denser and darker, leading the camera toward the looming entrance of a narrow canyon. The scene then shifts into a sheltered, shadowed environment where steep rock walls block the sky and the path becomes slick with ice, before the terrain finally opens up at the far end. The camera emerges from the canyon into a bright, expansive area where the character wades through a shallow river past abandoned military trucks and a red trailer, with towering snow-covered mountains rising under the sunlight.
